description: Ahmad, co-founder and CEO of Syndica, discusses their Web3 developer tools and infrastructure for the Solana ecosystem. He highlights their focus on RPC infrastructure, intelligent caching, and websocket multiplexing to enhance DApp performance and reliability.
topic_summary: Syndica provides essential Web3 infrastructure for Solana, focusing on RPC services, intelligent caching, and websocket support to improve DApp scalability and performance. They ensure high uptime and analytics for developers.
